comment.text: This key displays the maximum allowed file size for uploads. It appears as a label within a size limit setting component, likely in a file upload configuration section. Translators should ensure the text accurately reflects the file size limit in the user interface.

usage.context:
<SizeLimitSetter
 labelText={
 config.isMultipleUpload
 ? config.isFolderUpload
 ? t("MaximumFolderSizePerFolder")
 : t("MaximumFileSizePerFile")
 : config.isFolderUpload
 ? t("MaximumFolderSize")
 : t("MaximumFileSize")
 }
 tooltipText={
